  "findings": [
    "Fillet gauge fail (ME): weld size or profile does not meet specified dimensions per AWS D1.1/D1.3 and shop WPS",
    "Potential insufficient throat thickness or excessive convexity/concavity observed during gauge check"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Quarantine affected weldment and tag as non-conforming",
    "Notify welding supervisor and quality inspector",
    "Review WPS and rework procedure; grind out defective weld and re-weld to meet visual acceptance criteria"
  ],
  "rationale": "Fillet gauge failure indicates the weld is not within dimensional tolerances required by AWS D1.1/D1.3 and the shop WPS. At rough-complete stage, this is a non-conforming condition that must be corrected before the joint can be accepted. Risk is high because undersized or irregular fillet welds compromise joint strength and can lead to fatigue failure in service.",
  "references": [
    "AWS D1.1 Table 6.1 (visual acceptance criteria for fillet welds)",
    "AWS D1.3 (sheet steel fillet weld profiles)",
    "Shop WPS – welding parameters and acceptance limits"
  ]
}
